introduction.title: Web engineer specialising in human-focused experiences

bio.title: About
bio.text: I'm Jack and I'm passionate about accessible UI, design systems and cross-functional collaboration; I have spent the last 14 years building human-focused digital experiences, including CMS and API integrations, UX development and accessibility. Originally from a background in music production, I'm a big film and music nerd but I also like games, writing, travel, reading and making music. Based in Manchester.

items.title: Farkle friend
items.text: A local farkle multiplayer dice game, made with Next.js and React. Including different game variations and alternative modes.

items.title: HOAM
items.text: A design system for the coffee brand HOAM, used in the HOAM e-commerce template

items.title: HOAM Store
items.text: A an ecommerce template built for Shopify
